hero.title: Ruby's Music Rainforest
hero.subtitle: Discover your beautiful voice in the rainforest of music

about.headline: Even the smallest spark can light up a musical dream
about.description:
Holding a Master's degree in Popular Music Performance from the University of West London (UK), I have dedicated over five years to children's vocal education, with teaching experience spanning students aged 3 to 60. I previously served as Head of Children's Vocal Training at the Lee Wei Song Music Academy, where I developed extensive expertise in early childhood vocal development and advanced training.

My teaching approach integrates the Orff Schulwerk methodology, emphasizing natural vocal production and creative expression. I have also developed a proprietary system of music-and-movement games designed to cultivate rhythmic sense and musicality, enabling children to learn through play and discover their own unique voice.

In 2023, I released my original single and music video, Sunflower Under the Moon. In 2024, I was invited to write lyrics for Embrace the Sun, a promotional song for the Hangzhou Asian Games. I also contributed vocal harmony arrangement and recording for My Prime, a commercial campaign song featuring Korean stars Lee Min-ho and Jun Ji-hyun.

Awards include the Best Song Award at the 2023 SGSW "I Write My Song" competition, and the Best Melody Award at the 25th Xin Qing Rong Ji Chinese Songwriting Competition hosted by the National University of Singapore, among others.
about.philosophy: My teaching philosophy: Let music return to nature, let singing come from the heart.
